feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: New Beginnings
entry.summary:
Author: Moontra992

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,572Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 40

Summary: The final battle is won. Merlin has fulfilled his destiny. He is dropped from the sky into a new time and place and seeks to fit in and to figure out his new destiny - if there is any. He comes across a kind and welcoming family but soon realizes that nothing is quite as it seems...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 92,810Chapters: 61/?Kudos: 31

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: There is a Field of Gentle Gold, Rest Thy Head Upon It
entry.summary:
Author: millwhy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,267Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: AU in which Merlin and Arthur meet as young teenagers, find solace in each other's friendship, and, on this one particular occasion, accidentally terrorise some frogs.

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,428Chapters: 15/20Kudos: 56

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Cliche love story
entry.summary:
Author: Fanfihss

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,570Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: Merlin could stand women flirting with Arthur. After all he was the golden boy of the school.He could stand it, really. What he could not stand was seeing a man flirting with him. entry.title: Fortune Favors the Fool
entry.summary:
Author: xXRCSovaXx

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,223Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 118

Summary: “I wouldn’t touch the Major Arcana.” Arthur startled, nearly dropping the cards. He whirled around to the voice. “They get twitchy.”An ornamental crystal ball fell onto the floor behind him, shattering into millions of tiny pieces.Behind him was a man, probably near Arthur’s age. He registered the wide, bright eyes, pale skin, and dark hair. Arthur hadn’t heard him approach. Where did he come from?“The—” Arthur’s eyes jumped back to the magician card, “Major Arcana?”That sounded sort of... magicky“Yes, yes, they get so full of themselves.” The man’s lips twitched, and Arthur was inexplicably drawn to the hint of his grin. Or, a lot can happen when you take cover under a random shop's awning. Mostly, Arthur just wants to figure out why 'The Magician' card is always his future.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: bigger than the whole sky
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,479Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: The first drop struck the glass like a warning. Then another. And another. Until the rain came in earnest—unyielding, relentless, drumming against the castle with a force that felt almost deliberate. Arthur watched it without blinking. It fell hard and cold, washing over Camelot, over the rooftops, the courtyards, the empty paths. Unwelcome. Unstoppable. As the truth. cw: pregnancy loss

entry.title: my heart restarts as my life replays
entry.summary:
Author: petalswrites

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,331Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: "Merlin wants to follow Arthur, to never lay his eyes off of him, to treasure every fleeting moment they have left. He wants to never look at him again, to avoid the inevitability of losing him. Because no matter how many times he’s saved Arthur’s life, how many threats he’s stopped and will stop in the future, he will lose him. He will lose him and be forced to keep living until he forgets that Arthur ever existed." Merlin finds out he's immortal.

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,041Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 39

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Suffer More Gladly
entry.summary:
Author: LoveintheWind

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,400Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: In Camelot, it is a well-known fact that the heirs to the throne are utterly, hopelessly enthralled by their servants. It is a _less accurate_, but far more entertaining, rumor that the prince and the king's ward are secretly entangled themselves—or that their servants perform… other duties best left to imagination. What is _rarely acknowledged_ is that nearly everyone in the castle suffers the same affliction.While Merlin and Gwen inadvertently charm everyone in their immediate vicinity they are both far to busy with other matters to understand this and are consequently very lonely. Perhaps that is why pretending to court one another seemed like the only sensible solution at the time.--Story in progress themes, rating and tags subject to change.

entry.title: You Above All Others
entry.summary:
Author: bad_peppermint

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,683Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Mithian heard about Merlin long before she ever actually spoke to him. In fact, the servant was one of her future husband’s very favourite topics of conversation – Merlin’s insolence, his laziness, his incompetence. Arthur scoffed and sighed and shooed him away, but he paid attention to Merlin in a way he didn’t any of the other servants, and despite the tension that stretched between them like a worn-thin thread, there was affection woven through it, keeping it from breaking. Merlin, lowly, incompetent, infuriating servant that Arthur claimed him to be, was important. It was too bad, then, that Merlin did not seem to like her at all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: somewhere beyond the sea (my lover stands on golden sands)
entry.summary:
Author: highfunctioningclotpole

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,020Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 21

Summary: Merlin has always felt out of place beneath the sea, and far too drawn to the golden-haired king who walks the shoreline. Desperate to be part of Arthur’s world, he makes a dangerous bargain with a sea witch. Arthur brings the mysterious, silent stranger into his castle, never expecting the quiet man from the beach to upend his heart. As their bond deepens, Merlin carries a secret heavy enough to drown them both. Because the sea that Arthur fears is the home Merlin left behind.
